no-restricted-imports.name: Architectural violation: Icons must NOT import breakpoint hooks or view mode logic

paths.name: @/hooks/useBreakpoint
paths.message: Icons represent user intent, not responsive behavior. Icons must be pure and static.

paths.name: @/components/view-mode/viewModeColumns
paths.message: Icons must not access responsive mapping. Use ViewModeButton with resolveViewMode instead.

paths.name: @/components/view-mode/resolveViewMode
paths.message: Icons must not resolve view modes. Icons represent semantic intent only.

no-restricted-imports.name: Architectural violation: Cards must NOT import view mode or breakpoint logic

paths.name: @/hooks/useBreakpoint
paths.message: Cards must be layout-agnostic. Responsive logic lives in CardGrid + viewModeColumns only.

paths.name: @/components/view-mode/viewModeColumns
paths.message: Cards must not access view mode mapping. Cards receive layout via props only.

paths.name: @/components/view-mode/resolveViewMode
paths.message: Cards must not resolve view modes. Cards receive resolved columns via props.
